description_long: This is a stylized bottle with a tall, narrow neck and a wider, angular base. The bottle is adorned with a decorative red ribbon tied around its neck, and the main body features a cream-colored label with bold, hand-drawn text reading 'WHALE TUSK BRANDY.' The label also displays a graphic of a whale tusk and a checkered pattern in black and gold, giving it a distinctive and eye-catching appearance. The cap appears to be a simple, solid closure, possibly a cork or a wooden stopper. The bottle's surface has a matte, slightly rough finish, and the overall color palette includes muted browns, creams, reds, and blacks. There are no visible signs of damage or liquid inside the bottle.
description: A stylized, matte-finished bottle with a tall neck, decorative red ribbon, and a bold 'WHALE TUSK BRANDY' label featuring a whale tusk graphic and checkered pattern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red ribbon and partial label with geometric patterns.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full 'WHALE TUSK BRANDY' text and the ribbon hanging to the left.
description_view_2: Rear-side view highlighting the checkered pattern and partial label text.
description_view_3: Back view showing the whale tusk graphic and checkered pattern, with the ribbon visible on the right.
attribute_label_or_branding: Hand-drawn label with 'WHALE TUSK BRANDY' in black, bold letters on a cream background, accompanied by a whale tusk graphic and a black-and-gold checkered pattern.
